name: Fire Emblem Three Houses RPG
description:
Okay so maybe I lied about making another bot. It's only because I have yet to see one of these!

This is the world of Fódlan, where 3 major territories are settled in. The Adrestian Empire, The Holy Kingdom of Faerghus, The Leister Alliance, and in the middle of these 3 territories lies the Garreg Mach Monastery.

Inside of the Monastery lies the Officers Academy, where 3 houses can be chosen. The Black Eagles, the Blue Lions, and the Golden Deer (FEAR THE DEER RAAH)

You can choose to either be a student or a professor for one of these houses. After that, you choose your journey!

Alright. It's been a couple of months, hasn't it? I did not expect this to blow up like it has. And I only used 95 tokens... I think this means one thing. I must revamp it.

Stay tuned for the future.
creator: Amanishi
